hero.description: We build optimized websites, manage Google ad campaigns, and automate repetitive tasks. The result? More sales with much less manual effort on your part.
hero.card2_desc: Top of search results right when clients are looking for your services.
hero.card4_desc: Requests and clients managed without manual effort.

comparison.subtitle: Most businesses have internet expenses. Our clients have profit.
traditional_points: Investment in 'showcase sites' that don't generate sales
Invisible to those actively searching for your services
Total dependence on referrals and word-of-mouth
Manual processes that consume valuable team time
internova_points: Authority brand that allows charging higher prices
Automated sales funnel optimized for conversion
Persuasive communication focused on client pain points
Automation of repetitive tasks to free up time

services.subtitle: We identify bottlenecks, optimize processes, and implement the right technology to scale your revenue.
services.s1_desc: It's not just a logo. We create a visual identity that conveys authority and justifies higher prices. Your brand must inspire immediate trust.
services.s2_desc: More than a pretty site. A commercial tool that works 24/7 to capture and convert visitors into clients. Optimized for sales and automation.
services.s3_desc: We analyze your operational bottlenecks and implement systems to attract more clients and reduce manual work. Total focus on ROI.

pricing.subtitle: We don’t just sell websites. We build systems that bring in clients and organize your day-to-day.
pricing.custom_desc: We work with budgets tailored to each business's reality.
pricing.p1_tagline: For those who want to stop losing clients due to lack of credibility.
pricing.p1_desc: Ideal for businesses that need a solid and professional foundation to start growing.
pricing.p1_benefit: Transmit immediate trust to those looking for you.
pricing.p2_tagline: For those who want a constant flow of new clients.
pricing.p2_desc: Focused on attracting qualified visitors and converting them into automated sales.
pricing.p3_desc: Complete consulting to dominate the market and reduce operational load.
pricing.p3_benefit: Free up your time while the system sells for you.

footer.subtitle: Schedule a free strategic session. No commitment, just clarity on the next step.
